except Exception as e:
            result.errors.append(f"Placement failed: {e}")
            
        return result
    
    def _calculate_core_limited_die_size(self) -> Tuple[float, float]:
        """Calculate die size in CORE-LIMITED mode."""
        core_width = self.config.core_area.width
        core_height = self.config.core_area.height
        desired_margin = self.config.physical.desired_margin
        
        # Die size = core size + 2 * desired_margin
        die_width = core_width + 2 * desired_margin
        die_height = core_height + 2 * desired_margin
        
        # Ensure dimensions snap to grid
        die_width = round(die_width / self.geom.grid_size) * self.geom.grid_size
        die_height = round(die_height / self.geom.grid_size) * self.geom.grid_size
        
        # TODO: Check if I/O can fit with min_corner_clearance, expand if needed
        
        return die_width, die_height
    
    def _place_corners_die_edge_aligned(self, die_width: float, die_height: float) -> Dict[str, Tuple[Point, Orientation]]:
        """Place corners with die-edge alignment using geometry calculator."""
        corner_macro = self._get_corner_macro()
        if not corner_macro:
            return {}
            
        corner_info = self.lef.get_macro(corner_macro)
